title: Ocean Resin Coaster Set – Handmade Beach Art with Seashells & Sand | Coastal Home Decor
metaTitle: Ocean Resin Coaster Set – Handmade Beach Coasters for Coastal Decor
metaDescription: Bring the beach home with our Ocean Resin Coaster Set. Handcrafted with real seashells & sand. Perfect gift for ocean lovers. Order now for $28!
shortDescription: Handmade resin coasters with real seashells and sand – a coastal treasure for your home.
fullDescription:
Bring the calming essence of the ocean into your home with our Ocean Resin Coaster Set. Each coaster is meticulously handcrafted using premium epoxy resin, natural seashells, and real sand, capturing the beauty of the shoreline in a functional art piece. The set includes 4 coasters, each measuring 4x4 inches – perfect for protecting your surfaces while adding a touch of coastal charm.

**Emotional Hook:** Imagine sipping your morning coffee while the gentle waves and sandy shores inspire your day. These coasters are not just accessories; they are a daily reminder of your favorite beach memories.

**Customization:** Make them uniquely yours! We offer color customization to match your decor or personal style. Simply message us your preferred color palette, and we’ll bring your vision to life.

**Production & Shipping:** Each set is made to order with love and care. Please allow 5-7 days for production before shipping. Your patience ensures the highest quality.

**Perfect for:** Coastal home decor, beach-themed parties, or as a thoughtful gift for ocean lovers, surfers, and anyone who dreams of the sea. Pair them with a seashell tray or driftwood candle holder for a complete beachy vibe.
